message:
chore(deps): bump workspace dependencies to latest stable versions

Update core dependencies across the workspace:

- crossterm: 0.28 → 0.29.0
  * All terminal I/O crates (ftui-core, ftui-harness, ftui-runtime)
  * Brings improved event handling and Windows terminal support

- unicode-segmentation: 1.11 → 1.12.0
  * ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-text, ftui-widgets, ftui-extras
  * Better Unicode text boundary detection

- unicode-width: 0.2 → 0.2.2
  * ftui-render, ftui-runtime, ftui-text, ftui-widgets, ftui-extras
  * More accurate CJK and emoji width calculations

- smallvec: 1.13 → 1.15.1
  * ftui-render, ftui-text
  * Performance improvements for small vector allocations

- memchr: 2 → 2.7.6 (explicit version pin)
  * ftui-render
  * SIMD-optimized byte search

New feature flags added to ftui-extras:
- diagram: ASCII diagram detection and correction
- theme: Color themes with built-in palettes
- text-effects: Animated text effects (gradients, fades)

New feature flags enabled in ftui-demo-showcase:
- text-effects, theme

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@ caps-probe = []
 
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
-crossterm = "0.28"
+crossterm = "0.29.0"
 
 # Unix-only signal handling for cleanup on SIGINT/SIGTERM.
 [target.'cfg(unix)'.dependencies]

@@ -12,9 +12,9 @@ tracing = ["ftui-core/tracing", "dep:tracing"]
 [dependencies]
 bitflags = "2.10.0"
 memchr = "2.7.6"
-smallvec = "1.13.2"
-unicode-width = "0.2"
-unicode-segmentation = "1.11"
+smallvec = "1.15.1"
+unicode-width = "0.2.2"
+unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
 ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core" }
 tracing = { version = "0.1", optional = true }
 # Note: ftui-render is the core kernel and should not depend on ftui-style.

@@ -15,9 +15,9 @@ normalization = ["dep:unicode-normalization"]
 ftui-layout = { path = "../ftui-layout" }
 ftui-style = { path = "../ftui-style" }
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", optional = true }
-unicode-width = "0.2"
-unicode-segmentation = "1.11"
-smallvec = "1.13"
+unicode-width = "0.2.2"
+unicode-segmentation = "1.12.0"
+smallvec = "1.15.1"
 tracing = "0.1"
 lru = "0.12"
 rustc-hash = "2"
